---
title: "useNeuralData.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/logic/useNeuralData.ts"
loc: 62
complexity: 13
logic_score: 1.40
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 5.87
overall_score: 4.19
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)
- [Link](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `useNeuralData`
- `useNeuralData`
- `fallback`
- `files`
- `nodes`
- `nodeMap`
- `linkList`
- `usedIds`
- `pathStr`
- `orphans`
- `STELLAR_MAP`
- `STELLAR_MAP`
- `getStar`
- `getStar`
- `p`
